title: Iverilog Possible exception for bit-width pass-by-value in undefined function

features.name: undefined function with multi-bit wire argument
features.description: Code should include a call to a function that is not defined, where the caller passes a multi-bit wire signal as an argument

features.name: implicit bit-width function parameter with pass-by-value argument
features.description: Code should include a function with an implicit (default) bit-width parameter receiving a multi-bit value argument, causing simulator output mismatch

features.name: multi-bit wire passed to function causing timing-dependent simulation error
features.description: Code should include a 4-bit wire signal passed to a function, producing incorrect simulation output at specific simulation times (around 30-40 time units)
